testcase.name: test_basic_alias
testcase.failure:
self = <analytics.test.test_client.TestClient testMethod=test_basic_alias>
def test_basic_alias(self): client = self.client success, msg = client.alias('previousId', 'userId') client.flush() self.assertTrue(success) > self.assertFalse(self.failed) E AssertionError: True is not false
